text:
On Sat, 2013-05-25 at 19:14 +0200, Niclas Zeising wrote:
> This is a problem with clang, rather than xorg.  Can you please provide
> clang --version?
> Regards!

Here it is:

FreeBSD clang version 3.3 (trunk 178860) 20130405
Target: x86_64-unknown-freebsd10.0
Thread model: posix
